binops.type: String -> Validation e a -> Validation e a

binops.comment:
Access given field, wrapped in a `maybe` (Nothing if error).

    "hobby" ?= string
binops.type: String -> Validation e a -> Validation e (Maybe a)

binops.comment:
Infix version of `apply`:

Form.succeed SomeRecord
|: ("foo" := string)
|: ("bar" := string)
binops.type: Validation e (a -> b) -> Validation e a -> Validation e b
